get.summary: Health / liveness probe

post.summary: Authorize a card (pre-authorization hold)
post.description: Creates an authorization hold for the requested amount. Returns auth_id for use in subsequent reversal or capture. State: authorized.

400.description: Missing header, invalid timestamp, or malformed JSON

409.description: Duplicate X-RequestID or idempotency key conflict

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

post.summary: Sale (authorize + capture in a single step)
post.description: Authorizes and immediately captures the full amount. State: settled.

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

parameters.name: auth_id
parameters.description: The auth_id returned by the original /auth response (e.g. AUTH-4291).

post.summary: Reverse an authorization (void before capture)
post.description: Cancels an authorized hold before it is captured. Can only be applied to a transaction in 'authorized' state. State transition: authorized → reversed.

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

post.summary: Capture an authorized transaction
post.description: Moves an authorized hold into settlement. Capture amount must not exceed the authorized amount. Partial capture is allowed. State transition: authorized → captured.

422.description: Capture exceeds authorized amount, or auth is not in 'authorized' state

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

post.summary: Void a captured transaction (before settlement)
post.description: Removes a capture from the open settlement batch. The original authorization is restored to 'authorized' (re-capturable). State transition: captured → void_capture_complete.

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

post.summary: Refund a captured transaction (post-settlement credit)
post.description: Issues a credit against a captured transaction. Cumulative refunds cannot exceed the captured amount. Partial refunds are supported. State transition: capture record remains 'captured'; new 'refunded' record is created.

422.description: Refund amount + prior refunds exceed captured amount, or transaction not in 'captured' state

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

post.summary: Void a refund (cancel an in-flight credit)
post.description: Cancels a refund before the credit is posted. Restores the remaining_refundable balance on the parent capture. State transition: refunded → void_refund_complete.

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

post.summary: Standalone credit (loyalty / promotional credit)
post.description: Issues an independent credit not linked to any prior transaction (e.g. loyalty points cashback). State: credited.

parameters.name: X-RequestID
parameters.description: Unique UUID per request. Reusing within 10 min returns 409.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
parameters.description: Merchant identifier. Must be in the server-side allowlist.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Terminal-Id
parameters.description: Terminal / POS identifier.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must be within ±5 min of server time.

parameters.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Same key+body replays cached response for 5 min; same key+different body → 409.

original_transaction_id.description: transaction_id of the AUTH transaction to capture.
transaction_id of the CAPTURE transaction to void.
transaction_id of the CAPTURE transaction to refund against.
transaction_id of the REFUND transaction to void.

MerchantId.name: X-Levo-Merchant-Id
MerchantId.description: Merchant identifier. Must be present in the server-side allowlist (PAYMENTS_ALLOWED_MERCHANT_IDS).

RequestId.name: X-RequestID
RequestId.description: Globally unique request ID (UUID). Deduplicated for 10 minutes; re-using the same value within the window returns 409.

RequestTimestamp.name: X-Levo-Request-Timestamp
RequestTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp, e.g. 2026-06-25T12:00:00Z. Must be within ±5 minutes of server time.

IdempotencyKey.name: X-Levo-Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key (UUID). Requests with the same key and body replay the cached response for 5 minutes. Same key with a different body returns 409.
